title: Master of Social Work Program Mission and Vision
content:
Master of Social Work Program Mission and Vision

Social Work Master's program Mission and Vision

Mission

By using contemporary education methods and techniques, producing information and service models for social welfare areas; to educate qualified scientists who will contribute to social policies.

Vision

Our aim is to develop a high quality and an interdisciplinary approach to the development of researchers and academicians who have professional competence, research skills and solutions to developmental skills for academic production at national and international levels, and to be an institution that educates academicians to have the professional competence to effectively use the conceptual skills that dominate the theoretical orientation of social work.
